codeReview.summary: The validateIssueStatusTransition helper function is correctly implemented in packages/shared/src/validators/issue.ts. It follows TDD practices (tests written first), uses proper TypeScript types, validates against ISSUE_STATUS_TRANSITIONS, handles edge cases (same status, invalid statuses), and provides clear error messages. All 19 test cases pass.

issues.description: The validateIssueStatusTransition function and its types (IssueStatusTransition, IssueStatusTransitionResult) are exported from issue.ts but NOT re-exported from validators/index.ts. This means consumers must import directly from 'validators/issue.js' rather than the package root 'validators' or '@paperclipai/shared'. While the implementation works, adding re-exports to validators/index.ts would improve API discoverability and follow the pattern used by other validators in the codebase.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed TDD workflow per shared-package-worker skill: wrote failing tests first, then implemented to make them pass. The test patterns follow Vitest conventions matching other packages.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows Create(issue.test.ts) followed by Edit(issue.ts implementation), then test execution showing GREEN phase. Test file uses describe/it/expect patterns matching other packages.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill.md procedure says 'Run pnpm vitest run packages/shared to execute tests' but the actual command discovered to work was 'pnpm vitest run packages/shared' (no --filter needed). This is already reflected in services.yaml correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker discovering the correct command through trial: 'pnpm --filter @paperclipai/shared exec vitest run' didn't work as expected, but 'pnpm vitest run packages/shared' did.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly identified pre-existing server type errors as unrelated to the feature scope, as documented in AGENTS.md. This prevented scope creep.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff notes 'Pre-existing: TypeScript type errors in server package related to drizzle-orm PgColumn types - unrelated to this task'. AGENTS.md already documented this as known.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. The validateIssueStatusTransition function properly validates issue status transitions per business rules, handles all edge cases, and has comprehensive test coverage (19 tests all passing). TypeScript typecheck passes for the shared package. Minor non-blocking issue: the helper function could be re-exported from validators/index.ts for better API discoverability, though it is accessible via direct import from the issue.ts module.
